title: Illumina COVIDSeq Test: Tagment PCR Amplicons
author: Opentrons
materials: Drop tips into Opentrons Fixed Trash Bin

steps.title: Explanation of complex parameters below
steps.instruction: Explanation of complex parameters below: * `P300 Multichannel GEN2 Pipette Mount`: Choose the mount position of your P20 Multichannel pipette, either left or right. * `Plate 1 Columns`: Choose which columns master mix should be added on plate

steps.title: Separate column numbers with a comman (Ex
steps.instruction: Separate column numbers with a comman (Ex: 1,2,3,4). * `Plate 2 Columns`: Choose which columns master mix should be added on plate

steps.title: Separate column numbers with a comman (Ex
steps.instruction: Separate column numbers with a comman (Ex: 1,2,3,4). * `Temperature (C)`: Choose the temperature the temperature module should be set at in the beginning of the protocol. * `Master Mix Column`: Choose the column on the 12-channel reservoir for the master mix for Plate 1. ---

steps.title: Pick up tips from Opentrons 96...
steps.instruction: Pick up tips from Opentrons 96 Filter Tip Rack 200 µL on Slot 10

steps.title: Aspirate 190
steps.instruction: Aspirate 190.0 uL from Column 1 (A1) of Master Mix Reservoir

steps.title: Dispense 30 uL into Column 1...
steps.instruction: Dispense 30 uL into Column 1 (A1) of Plate 1 on Slot 11
